description: A Research Data Manager is preparing a PEBL cognitive behavioral dataset for publication. Convert the flat directory of raw PEBL logs at ~/pebl/raw_data/ into a BIDS-compliant structure at ~/pebl/bids_dataset/. The new structure must include a dataset_description.json with 'Name' and 'BIDSVersion' keys, and a participants.json data dictionary. Convert ~/pebl/raw_data/demographics.csv to ~/pebl/bids_dataset/participants.tsv by renaming the 'id' column to 'participant_id', prefixing ID values with 'sub-', and saving as a tab-separated file. Organize the 12 raw logs (covering 3 participants and 4 tasks: bart, flanker, simon, wcst) into subject-specific behavioral folders (e.g., sub-<label>/beh/) named precisely as sub-<label>_task-<taskname>_beh.csv, ensuring all original suffixes like _raw, _data, _log, or _out are removed. Additionally, create four task JSON sidecars in the root directory (task-bart_beh.json, task-flanker_beh.json, task-simon_beh.json, and task-wcst_beh.json) each containing the key-value pair {"SoftwareName": "PEBL"}.
